jira.notes: Timeline rows in outcomes[] are canonical for VI-WSB-Outcome-Map.html; edit this file first, then refresh #vi-outcomes-fallback in the HTML. Each outcome may include status (e.g. empty string or "complete" for a bar checkmark, same as wm-outcomes.json). Populate jira_epic_key per outcome when VI-WBS.md §9 lists stable Epic keys. Optional dependency_edges[]: same object shape as PA-Outcome-map.html depEdges.

outcomes.title: PagerDuty AIOps Deployed & Validated
outcomes.detail: ALREADY UNDERWAY. Phase 1-2 complete (initial install configured). Phase 3 + 30-day ML learning + tuning + DMSi handover. Independent of Dynatrace Apr 1 start.

outcomes.title: Foundation Planning & Architecture (Dynamo NGINX POC)
outcomes.date_range: Weeks 1-2; align with Pipeline Automation NGINX POC
outcomes.detail: VI-OC-01.1–01.3 only: environment inventory, Dynatrace architecture design, integration architecture (PagerDuty, status page, CheckMK). DMSi Dynatrace platform + M3 deliverables (A2W strategy, scripts, Elastic, in-env POC) are VI-OC-03.

outcomes.title: Telemetry Strategy & Licensing
outcomes.detail: ABL telemetry eval, OpenTelemetry feasibility, log retention review, licensing procurement (long pole), RBAC design. 1.5 FTE conservative: 4 weeks.

outcomes.title: Platform & Integrations Deployed (DMSi NGINX POC)
outcomes.date_range: M3 — May/Jun band; full outcome due milestone 3
outcomes.detail: VI-OC-03.1–03.4: tenant, ActiveGate, PagerDuty, status page. VI-OC-03.5–03.8: A2W telemetry strategy, script rationalization, Elastic inventory, DMSi Dynatrace POC execution (OTO, training, trial). SOSAVE remains VI-OC-08.

outcomes.title: Host Fleet Instrumented
outcomes.detail: OneAgent deployment across all hosts. PASOE/OpenEdge monitoring. Maintenance windows required. 1.5 FTE conservative: 3 weeks (window scheduling adds risk).

outcomes.title: Infrastructure Visibility Validated
outcomes.detail: Dashboard build (2 wks) + 30-day validation: Dynatrace >= CheckMK. Coverage >= 95%. Max 2 cycles. Fallback: trigger VI-OC-15.

outcomes.title: Log Management Migrated
outcomes.detail: PARALLEL with VI-OC-04/VI-OC-05. Log activation, ingestion, parsing, Elastic alert migration + 30-day parallel validation. 9 weeks at shared FTE.

outcomes.title: External Availability Monitoring
outcomes.detail: PARALLEL with VI-OC-04/VI-OC-05. Synthetic monitors, MTTD baseline, network path monitoring, NetApp ONTAP. 4 weeks at shared FTE.

outcomes.title: Application Telemetry Operational
outcomes.detail: Starts during VI-OC-05 validation (should dep). APM scope, PASOE service detection, custom metrics incl. SOSAVE (service-order save duration; fileshare/SME access), OpenTelemetry eval. HIGHEST RISK: dev team capacity; SOSAVE blocked without access (VI-R-20).

outcomes.title: Baselines & Data Quality Validated
outcomes.detail: Infrastructure, application, and synthetic baselines. SLO definitions. PagerDuty AIOps confirmation. Engineering review. 3 weeks.

outcomes.title: Alerting Optimized & Dashboards Live
outcomes.detail: Alert audit and tuning (<50/week target). PagerDuty AIOps integration. Persona dashboards (engineering, support, leadership). Trust validation. 3 weeks.

outcomes.title: Proactive Operations Validated
outcomes.detail: MTTD <= 10 min sustained 4 weeks. Status page validated. Error budget policy. Runbook + knowledge transfer. M5 evidence package. 5 weeks (includes 4-week measurement).

outcomes.title: Legacy Systems Decommissioned
outcomes.detail: Elastic shutdown (TYPE 1 decision). CheckMK decommission evaluation. Gates on BOTH VI-OC-05 and VI-OC-06 validation. 3 weeks.

outcomes.title: A2W Monitoring Readiness
outcomes.detail: CONDITIONAL: Triggers when A2W launch date confirmed. Synthetic test activation + RUM deployment. 6-week lead time needed.

outcomes.title: Predictive Ops & Advanced
outcomes.detail: CONDITIONAL: Triggers after VI-OC-11 complete. DORA metrics, SLI-driven prioritization, customer experience correlation.

outcomes.title: Legacy Fallback
outcomes.detail: CONDITIONAL: Triggers if VI-OC-05 or VI-OC-09 validation fails after max iterations. Legacy systems maintained; revised plan to Hilltop.

dependency_edges.timing: VI-WBS §3: architecture (VI-OC-01) should precede or overlap DMSi platform work; document risk if VI-OC-03.8 runs fully ahead of VI-OC-01 exit.
dependency_edges.prerequisite: Parity with VI-OC-03 Dependencies table and CW-08 coordination with PA-OC-00 (WSA-3758).
dependency_edges.cross_cutting: CW-08: VI-OC-01 schedule coupling with Pipeline Automation PA-OC-00.

dependency_edges.timing: VI-OC-16 runs on existing PagerDuty sources without waiting for VI-OC-03; complete VI-OC-03.3 before holistic AIOps tuning that includes Dynatrace-sourced alerts.
dependency_edges.prerequisite: Dynatrace → PagerDuty is not a hard gate for PD-native AIOps phases 1–3 (VI-WBS VI-OC-16 Dependencies).
